subcodes.first_line: O thou who art seeking enlightenment from the Supreme Sun of Guidance! Moses beheld, from the verdant Tree, a flame of fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشرق از شمس هدایت کبری حضرت موسی از شجره خضراء شعله ناری مشاهده نمود و
subcodes.subjects: @Moses, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @spiritual transformation
